name: Flame Turret
notes: Tinder Box's specialty defense, in addition to the generic Turret/Missile Launcher every base gets. A Turret variant (see "extends"). Renamed from Flamethrower to avoid colliding with the Barracks infantry unit of the same name. damageTypes:[Fire] carries a bonus against Wood-tagged targets (Wood Walls, Wood Towers, Wood Docks/Bridges) via their own damageReceivedModifiers, mirroring the existing Wood-vs-Fire vulnerability elsewhere in the design. No Naval or Air targeting, unlike base Turret — ground-only.
